spec_match.rationale: The AI demo appends ordered token spans through repeated <template for> chunks that include a fresh marker.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP selected token 4, token 2, and token 6 as bottlenecks, clicked Reload stream for each, and verified eight ordered token spans rendered through native marker appends.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now describes repeated marker patching rather than fetch reader token concatenation.

edge_cases.rationale: The stream demonstrates multiple appends to one range while preserving the ordered AI response when a bottleneck token delays dependent tokens.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus and the WICG patching explainer.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared live-patching styles and repo design variables.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP found and verified the token-order fix: all bottleneck choices now render the ordered sentence, leave no placeholders/templates behind, and pass clean console/network and conformance checks.
